entries.zh: Grok Web 账号状态栏新增“未开启 NSFW”快速筛选，可直接查看需要开启 NSFW 的账号。
entries.en: Added a 'NSFW disabled' quick filter to the Grok Web account status bar.

entries.zh: 修复 Web 注册自动开启 NSFW 容易漏开的默认状态；切换到 Web 注册时默认勾选，切换到 Build 时自动关闭。
entries.en: Fixed the Web registration NSFW option being easy to miss by enabling it by default for Web and disabling it for Build.

entries.zh: Web 注册任务新增“注册完成后开启 NSFW”开关，开启后会在账号导入并首次同步成功后自动设置。
entries.en: Added an 'Enable NSFW after registration' option for Web registration tasks, applied after account import and initial sync succeed.

entries.zh: 自动开启 NSFW 失败时，注册结果会明确标记为失败并记录成功、失败数量。
entries.en: Registration results now explicitly report NSFW setup failures with succeeded and failed counts.

entries.zh: 账号管理新增 Grok Web 账号级 NSFW 开启/关闭、批量操作、状态标签和快速筛选。
entries.en: Added account-level NSFW controls for Grok Web accounts, including bulk actions, status labels, and quick filtering.

entries.zh: 新增导入账号后自动开启 NSFW 的能力。
entries.en: Added automatic NSFW enablement after account import.

entries.zh: 媒体管理新增本地图片缓存统计、文件列表、单文件删除和全部清空。
entries.en: Added local image cache statistics, file listing, individual deletion, and full clearing to media management.

entries.zh: 修复 NSFW gRPC-Web 空成功响应被误判为失败的问题。
entries.en: Fixed empty successful NSFW gRPC-Web responses being incorrectly treated as failures.

entries.zh: 优化账号状态筛选条和 NSFW 快速筛选布局。
entries.en: Improved the account status filter bar and NSFW quick-filter layout.

entries.zh: 修复 Grok Web 生图与对话调度：模糊 429 保留真实额度并短暂冷却换号，只有上游明确确认耗尽时才标记对应额度窗口。
entries.en: Fixed Grok Web image and chat scheduling so ambiguous 429 responses preserve quota and retry another account, while only confirmed exhaustion marks the relevant quota window.

entries.zh: 账号管理新增按当前筛选结果全选、反选和清空选择，并补齐 Web 额度耗尽状态展示。
entries.en: Added filtered select-all, invert, and clear-selection actions to account management, plus accurate Web quota exhaustion status.

entries.zh: 修复协议注册代理预检与 worker 参数传递，支持直连、显式代理和系统代理解析，并返回具体失败检查项。
entries.en: Fixed protocol registration proxy preflight and worker argument propagation for direct, explicit, and system proxy modes, with actionable failed-check details.

entries.zh: 补齐注册代理、Turnstile Solver 和服务器发布目录的 Compose 配置与部署说明。
entries.en: Completed Compose configuration and deployment guidance for registration proxies, the Turnstile solver, and server release directories.

entries.zh: 新增版本更新入口、可滚动版本历史、更新状态圆点和自动提醒。
entries.en: Added the version center, scrollable release history, update indicator, and automatic reminders.

entries.zh: 版本信息由构建时 VERSION 注入，并从 GitHub manifest 检查最新版本。
entries.en: Injects the current VERSION at build time and checks the latest GitHub manifest.

entries.zh: 修复协议注册在 Docker 与服务器环境中的 Solver、代理和预检配置。
entries.en: Fixed Solver, proxy, and preflight settings for protocol registration in Docker and server deployments.

entries.zh: spool 文件增加跨进程原子认领，避免多个实例重复导入同一凭据。
entries.en: Added cross-process atomic spool claims to prevent duplicate credential imports.

entries.zh: 失败凭据支持定时清理，服务器发布目录、数据目录和注册网络配置改为稳定参数。
entries.en: Added failed-credential retention and stable server paths and registration network settings.

entries.zh: 发布 Grok2API v3 管理后台、注册任务、聊天工作区和媒体管理能力。
entries.en: Released the Grok2API v3 console, registration tasks, chat workspace, and media management.
